/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/gplaydl.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/gplaydl.dir/src/gplaydl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gplaydl.dir/src/common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gplaydl.dir/src/config.cpp.o -o gplaydl  libgplayapi.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so
